output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?date WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P585 ?date .
  ?item wdt:P1152 wd:Q264167 .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?date) , "-11-23"))
}
ORDER BY DESC(?date)
LIMIT 1
